title: Ship v7.9 Externalization Readiness Boundary
description: Define and verify the bounded pre-v8 externalization readiness layer: external actor/tool/provider/reference claims must carry source-of-truth, permission, freshness, availability, approval, provenance, and not-proven boundaries before AOF treats them as governed runtime resources.
triage_notes: v7.9 externalization readiness boundary implemented and ready for release verification
